title: acinos arvensis var. argutus
intro: Acinos arvensis var. argutus, also known as mint-leafed thyme or argutus thyme, is a variety of the Acinos arvensis plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Acinos arvensis var. argutus include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Acinos arvensis var. argutus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
